rulings.Case Title: SHARON DUNN et al VS. AMCHEM PRODUCTS, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Compel The Depositions Of The Person Most Qualified And Custodian Of Records Of Defendant Kelly Moore Paint Company And Request For Sanctions Against Defendant And Or Its Attorneys; Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Cassiana Aaronson; [Proposed] Order
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, January 15, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1, Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel the depositions of the person most qualified and custodian of records of defendant Kelly Moore Paint Co. and request for sanctions is continued on the court¿s own motion to February 20, 2013 to give the parties time to meaningfully meet and confer. The court strongly encourages the parties to attend an informal discovery conference with the court. If the parties wish to do so they can contact the court¿s clerk to schedule the meeting. If all issues raised by the motion have not been resolved, then by February 15, 2013 at 12:00noon the parties must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, the issues that remain in dispute and then must appear at the hearing on February 5, 2013. = (503/TLJ)
